response.justification: Strong individual contributor with 20 years of engineering and solid backend/systems experience, but lacks critical CTO qualifications: no demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems, zero fintech infrastructure or regulated-environment experience, and no track record scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people. Recent vague mention of agentic work (6 months at re:cinq) is insufficient for an executive AI systems architecture role. This is a senior engineer, not an executive CTO.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering with progression to senior roles across web, backend, and systems
Proven experience at scale: Dunnhumby's microservices handling millions of requests/second demonstrates distributed systems capability
Recent exposure to agentic frameworks (MCP, LangGraph context) at re:cinq, though depth unclear
concerns: Zero fintech experience despite it being a hard requirement; investment exposure at RIDE Capital (1.3 years) is insufficient for credit risk, liquidity, or compliance architecture
Agentic AI production experience is recent and vague (6-month window at re:cinq); no evidence of building, operating, or scaling multi-agent systems in production
No evidence of technical leadership at scale: no mention of hiring, team building, or leading 10-30+ engineers; career shows frequent job changes without deep organizational scaling
